hook.summary: High-energy anime battle sequence featuring Vegito Blue charging and firing a massive energy blast.
hook.visual_action: Vegito Blue charges a glowing energy sphere and fires a beam directly at the camera with intense visual effects.

scene_flow: Vegito Blue charges a powerful energy attack with intense visual effects and speed lines.
He fires a massive yellow beam (Final Flash) that fills the screen.
The scene transitions to a close-up of Vegito Blue performing a rapid-fire melee combo with kinetic impact effects.
The ad concludes with a static end card featuring the game logo, character art, and a 'Play Now' button.
audience_proxy: Male anime fans aged 18-35 who enjoy high-intensity battle games and the Dragon Ball franchise.
